34:1:1.m: the praise (subject of belongs to اللَّهِ)

34:1:4.m: for him/to him/belongs to him (connected to مَا فِى ٱلسَّمٰوٰتِ - what is in the heavens)

34:1:14.m: the Hereafter (possessed by Allah in this ayah)

34:2:3.m: he enters deeply (into الْأَرْضِ - the earth)

34:2:7.m: he goes out/exits (present action in يَعْلَمُ sequence)

34:2:9.m: and what (connects to يَخْرُجُ - comes out)

34:2:10.m: he descends (present action in مَا يَنزِلُ مِنَ ٱلسَّمَآءِ - what descends from the sky)

34:2:15.m: in it (referring to الأرض - the earth)

34:3:1.m: and he said (subject of ٱلَّذِينَ كَفَرُوا۟)

34:3:4.m: not (negates تَأْتِينَا - will come to us)

34:3:6.m: The Hour (subject of لَا تَأْتِينَا - does not come to us)

ةُ: (subject of لَا تَأْتِينَا - does not come to us)

34:3:8.m: yes indeed, certainly (responding to لَا تَأْتِينَا - 'it will not come to us')

34:3:10.m: I swear you all will definitely come/arrive (addressing the disbelievers)

34:3:16.m: the weight (subject of يَعْزُبُ - escapes/is hidden)

34:3:17.m: of a tiny particle/atom (object of مِثْقَالُ)

34:3:21.m: in (location of مِثْقَالُ ذَرَّةٍ - weight of an atom)

34:3:27.m: and not (connects to previous لَا and negates أَصْغَرُ - smaller)

34:4:2.m: those who (referring to the believers mentioned after)

34:4:5.m: the righteous deeds (acted on by عَمِلُوا)

34:4:6.m: those (who believed and did good deeds)

34:5:1.m: and those who (who strove against Our signs)

34:5:5.m: those who try to challenge/frustrate (Allah's signs)

34:5:7.m: for them (refers to those who strive against Our signs)

34:5:11.m: severely painful (describes عَذَابٌ, in a general sense)

34:6:1.m: and he sees (subject of يَهْدِي - guides)

34:6:4.m: the knowledge (object of أُوتُوا - were given)

34:6:5.m: which/that (refers to what was sent down)

34:6:7.m: to you (object of أُنزِلَ - was sent down)

34:6:8.m: from (connects رَبِّكَ 'your Lord' to what came before)

34:6:10.m: he (referring to what was sent down)

هُوَ: he (referring to what was sent down)

34:7:5.m: we point/direct you all (in response to هَلْ - 'can')

34:7:11.m: all, every (object of مُزِّقْتُمْ - you were torn)

34:7:14.m: surely in (connects إِنَّكُمْ to خَلْقٍ جَدِيدٍ)

34:7:15.m: a creation (being described as new in جَدِيدٍ)

34:8:4.m: a lie (object of أَفْتَرَىٰ/has he invented)

34:8:5.m: or (connecting to أَفْتَرَىٰ - did he invent)

34:8:6.m: with/by him/it (referring to كَذِبًا - a lie)

34:8:7.m: a madness (accusation against Prophet Muhammad ﷺ)

34:8:11.m: they believe (those who don't believe in the Hereafter)

34:9:2.m: they see (in response to أَفَلَمْ - 'then do they not')

34:9:6.m: their hands (referring to what is before them)

34:9:16.m: the earth (object being acted upon in نَخْسِفْ)

34:9:25.m: that, that one (pointing to something far)

34:9:29.m: one who earnestly returns (to Allah) (possessed by عَبْدٍ)

34:10:5.m: a favor, a bounty (object of آتَيْنَا/we gave)

34:10:9.m: and the birds (as something given to David)

34:11:4.m: and measure precisely! (command to Prophet Dawud about making armor)

34:11:6.m: of the weaving (of chain mail links)

34:11:8.m: righteously/in a good way (describing how the action اعْمَلْ 'do/make' is done)

ًا: (describing how the action اعْمَلْ 'do/make' is done)

34:12:9.m: spring/source (object acted upon, of القِطْرِ - molten copper)

34:12:12.m: the jinn (invisible beings mentioned in this ayah about Prophet Sulaiman)

جِنِّ: jinn (invisible beings mentioned in this ayah about Prophet Sulaiman)

34:13:1.m: they work (referring to the jinn working for Prophet Sulaiman)

34:13:5.m: from/of (connects مَّحٰرِيبَ to what comes before)

34:13:7.m: and statues (object of يَعْمَلُونَ - they made)

34:13:10.m: and cooking pots (acted upon by مِن)

34:13:15.m: gratitude, thanks (as the object being given)

34:14:10.m: the creature (as the subject of تَأْكُلُ - it eats)

ُ: (as the subject of تَأْكُلُ - it eats)

34:14:11.m: of the earth (possessed by/connected to something)

34:14:12.m: she/it eats/is eating (subject of دَآبَّةُ ٱلْأَرْضِ)

34:14:13.m: his staff (being eaten by دَآبَّةُ ٱلْأَرْضِ)

34:14:17.m: the jinn (as the subject who realized)

34:14:21.m: they know (referring to the jinn in this ayah)

34:15:2.m: he/it was (past tense verb in لَقَدْ كَانَ)

34:15:19.m: and a lord/master (connected to غَفُورٌ - forgiving)

34:16:2.m: so we sent forth (after they turned away)

34:16:9.m: possessing/having (feminine dual, describing جَنَّتَيْنِ - two gardens)

34:16:12.m: and a tamarisk tree (coordinated with خَمْطٍ)

34:17:4.m: they rejected (truth) (subject of جَزَيْنٰهُم - we recompensed them)

34:17:8.m: the extremely ungrateful one (object of نُجٰزِىٓ)

34:18:3.m: and between (connects previous phrase to القُرَى 'the towns')

34:18:5.m: which/that (feminine, referring to the villages that)

34:18:11.m: in it/her (referring to the blessed towns)

34:18:14.m: in it (referring to القُرَى 'the towns' mentioned earlier)

34:19:2.m: O our Lord! (being called out to in فَقَالُوا)

34:19:7.m: their selves (acted upon by ظَلَمُوا - they wronged)

34:19:10.m: and we tore them apart completely

34:19:13.m: indeed/verily (strongly emphasizes the statement فِى ذٰلِكَ لَءَايٰتٍ that follows)

34:20:2.m: he confirmed/proved true (the thought of إِبْلِيسُ)

34:20:4.m: Iblis (Satan's name, as the subject of صَدَّقَ - verified)

ُ: as the subject of صَدَّقَ - verified)

34:20:8.m: a group (object of فَٱتَّبَعُوهُ - they followed)

34:21:18.m: upon (guardian over كُلِّ شَىْءٍ - all things)

34:22:3.m: those who (refers to the false gods mentioned in زَعَمْتُم)

نَ: (refers to the false gods mentioned in زَعَمْتُم)

34:22:19.m: in both of them (the heavens and earth)

34:23:3.m: the act of helping by speaking for someone (subject of تَنفَعُ)

شَفَاعَ: act of helping by speaking for someone

34:23:7.m: he permitted (subject of قَالَ - he said)

34:23:10.m: when (followed by فُزِّعَ - terror is removed)

34:23:14.m: they said (in response to مَاذَا قَالَ رَبُّكُمْ - what did your Lord say?)

34:23:17.m: your Lord (what was said according to قَالُوا)

34:23:18.m: they said (referring to those whose hearts had fear removed)

34:23:19.m: the truth (object of قَالُوا۟ - what they said)

34:23:21.m: The Most High (subject of the sentence)

34:23:22.m: The Great One (a name/attribute of Allah)

34:24:3.m: he provides you all (with what you need)

أَوْ: or (giving a choice between two groups)

34:24:16.m: in a state of straying (in relation to فِى before it)

34:25:2.m: no/not (emphasizing the negation of تُسْـَٔلُونَ - you are asked)

34:25:3.m: you (all) are being asked (about عَمَّآ أَجْرَمْنَا)

34:25:8.m: about what (asking about what you do)

34:26:1.m: say! (command to Prophet Muhammad ﷺ to speak to the disbelievers)

قُلْ: say! (command to Prophet Muhammad ﷺ to speak to the disbelievers)

34:26:6.m: he opens/judges between (subject: رَبُّنَا - our Lord)

34:26:8.m: with the truth (describes how يَفْتَحُ/he will judge is done)

34:26:9.m: and He (refers to Allah who will judge between us)

هُوَ: He (refers to Allah who will judge between us)

34:26:10.m: The Supreme Judge (one of Allah's names)

34:26:11.m: the All-Knowing (divine name of Allah, subject of this sentence)

عَلِيمُ: All-Knowing (divine name of Allah, subject of this sentence)

34:27:4.m: you all made (something) join/catch up (with بِهِۦ)

34:27:6.m: partners (being accused as false partners with Allah)

آءَ: (being accused as false partners with Allah)

34:27:8.m: rather/but rather (contradicts the previous claim about شُرَكَآءَ partners)

34:27:11.m: The Mighty, The Powerful (as a name of Allah, subject of this phrase)

34:28:6.m: a bearer of good news (object of أَرْسَلْنٰكَ - we sent you)

34:28:12.m: they know (referring to most people in ٱلنَّاسِ)

34:29:2.m: when (asking about the time of الْوَعْدُ/the promise)

34:29:4.m: the promise (subject of when will this be?)

34:30:2.m: for/to you all (emphasizing the statement in قُل)

34:30:3.m: the appointed time (subject of the sentence)

34:30:9.m: and not (connects to previous negative statement)

34:31:7.m: the Quran (object of بِ in بِهٰذَا)

34:31:14.m: when (past time, connected to what follows)

إِذِ: when (past time, connected to what follows)

34:31:16.m: those who are made to stop (the wrongdoers in this ayah)

34:31:17.m: with/at/by (location relative to رَبِّهِمْ - their Lord)

34:31:25.m: those who (subject of يَقُولُ - they say)

34:31:29.m: if not/were it not for (addressing those who were arrogant)

34:32:4.m: to those who (who were made weak)

34:32:6.m: is it we? (who صَدَدْنٰكُمْ prevented you)

34:32:9.m: the guidance (that was rejected by those who were arrogant)

34:32:10.m: after (refers to time after إِذْ/when in this ayah)

34:32:11.m: when (referring to the time after guidance came)

34:32:13.m: rather (contradicting what the arrogant ones claimed)

بَلْ: rather (contradicting what the arrogant ones claimed)

34:33:3.m: they were made weak/were considered weak

34:33:18.m: and they kept secret (connected to previous statement)

34:33:24.m: the chains (that will be placed around the necks of those who disbelieved)

أَغْلٰلَ: chains (that will be placed around the necks of those who disbelieved)

34:33:25.m: in (connects أَعْنَاقِ to what came before)

34:33:27.m: those who (referring to those who disbelieved)

34:33:30.m: they are given what is due

34:33:31.m: except for (what they used to do)

34:34:4.m: of a town/village (in فِى قَرْيَةٍ - in a town)

34:34:13.m: with it/by it (referring to what was sent with the warner)

34:35:2.m: we (as the subject of قَالُوا - they said)

34:35:3.m: more numerous (than others in wealth and children)

كْثَرُ: numerous (than others in wealth and children)

34:35:8.m: among those who are being severely punished

بِينَ: those who are being severely punished

34:36:9.m: and yet/however (connecting to يَبْسُطُ - he extends)

34:36:11.m: of the people (in أَكْثَرَ ٱلنَّاسِ - most of the people)

34:36:13.m: they know (referring to most people in أَكْثَرَ ٱلنَّاسِ)

34:37:1.m: and what/and not (connects this to أَمْوٰلُكُمْ)

34:37:5.m: by/with the one which (connects to تُقَرِّبُكُمْ - brings you closer)

34:37:14.m: so those ones (referring to the believers mentioned before)

أُو۟لٰٓئِكَ: those ones (referring to the believers mentioned before)

34:37:18.m: with what (refers to عَمِلُوا - what they did)

34:38:2.m: they strive/make effort (referring to those who try to invalidate Our signs)

34:38:4.m: Our signs/miracles (that the disbelievers are trying to challenge)

34:38:5.m: those who try to frustrate/challenge (Allah's signs)

34:38:9.m: they (all) are made to be present

34:39:1.m: say! (command to Prophet Muhammad ﷺ to speak to the people)

قُلْ: say! (command to Prophet Muhammad ﷺ to speak to the people)

34:39:4.m: he spreads out (referring to رَبِّى spreading rizq/provision)

34:39:17.m: he compensates/replaces it (referring to what was spent in the way of Allah)

34:40:6.m: to the angels (who are being addressed by يَقُولُ - he says)

34:40:9.m: they were (subject of يَقُولُ - he says)

34:41:1.m: they said (referring to the disbelievers in this ayah)

34:41:10.m: the jinn (as the object being worshipped)

34:42:1.m: so today (in response to their previous actions)

34:42:3.m: he controls/owns (negated by لَا before it)

34:42:4.m: some of you (as subject of يَمْلِكُ)

34:42:8.m: harm (as the object being acted upon in يَمْلِكُ)

ًا: (as the object being acted upon in يَمْلِكُ)

34:42:11.m: they acted unjustly (subject of نَقُولُ - we say)

34:42:12.m: taste! (command to many people) (referring to عَذَابَ 'punishment')

34:42:15.m: which, that (feminine, referring to النَّارِ - the Fire)

34:42:16.m: you all were (referring to those who denied the truth)

34:42:17.m: with it/her (referring to النَّارِ - the Fire)

34:43:2.m: it (our clear signs) is being recited (upon them)

34:43:4.m: our signs (subject of تُتْلَى - are recited)

34:43:5.m: clear proofs/signs (object of تُتْلَىٰ - being recited)

34:43:14.m: about what (asking what your forefathers used to worship)

34:43:15.m: he was (used with يَعْبُدُ to mean 'used to worship')

نَ: (used with يَعْبُدُ to mean 'used to worship')

34:43:24.m: and he said (connecting to the previous statement)

34:43:28.m: when (referring to جَآءَهُمْ - it came to them)

34:43:33.m: magic (that the disbelievers claimed about the truth)

ٌ: (that the disbelievers claimed about the truth)

34:44:2.m: we gave them (referring to books/scriptures mentioned in مِّن كُتُبٍ)

34:44:5.m: they study/are studying it (referring to كُتُب/books mentioned earlier)

34:45:10.m: and so they denied/rejected (the messengers mentioned in رُسُلِى)

34:46:10.m: then, after that (connects تَتَفَكَّرُوا with تَقُومُوا)

34:46:11.m: you all reflect/think deeply (command to a group)

34:47:17.m: a witness (subject of being on/over كُلِّ شَىْءٍ)

34:48:4.m: he throws forcefully (subject of إِنَّ رَبِّى)

34:48:5.m: with the truth (object of يَقْذِفُ - he casts)

34:48:7.m: of the hidden/unseen things (possessed by عَلَّامُ)

34:51:3.m: when (referring to a specific past moment)

34:51:5.m: so there is no (escape from punishment)

34:52:2.m: we believed! (in response to وَقَالُوٓا۟ - and they said)

34:52:6.m: the [impossible] reaching (from مَّكَانٍۭ بَعِيدٍ - a distant place)

34:52:7.m: from (connects مَّكَانٍۭ to what comes before)

34:53:2.m: they rejected/denied (subject of يَقْذِفُونَ - they throw)

34:53:6.m: and they throw (connected to كَفَرُوا - they disbelieved)

34:53:9.m: a place (connected to مِن before it)

34:54:1.m: and was prevented (from بَيْنَهُمْ وَبَيْنَ مَا يَشْتَهُونَ)

34:54:6.m: just as (connects to فُعِلَ - was done)

34:54:8.m: with their followers (like what was done to those before them)

34:54:12.m: they were (referring to those mentioned in إِنَّهُمْ)

34:54:13.m: in (connects شَكٍّ to what came before)

34:54:14.m: in doubt (in فِى شَكٍّ - in doubt)
